_comment: Approval request with interactive buttons — agent pauses here waiting for human input
text: ⚠️ Approval required: Pod eviction to resolve disk pressure

text.text:
*Root cause:*
`imageprovider` nginx logging misconfiguration causing excessive disk writes under load generator traffic spike. Node disk at 91%, checkout service degraded.

*Evidence:*
• Node disk usage: *91%* (threshold: 85%)
• `imageprovider` disk writes: *340MB/8min* (normal: ~28MB/8min)
• Checkout p99 latency: *890ms* (normal: 120ms)
• OTel collector emptyDir: 87% — within normal range (not the cause)

*Recommended evictions (lowest priority first):*
1. `loadgenerator` — synthetic traffic, *zero user impact*
2. `imageprovider` — product images unavailable, browsing affected
3. `adservice` — ads stop showing, no revenue impact

*Estimated disk recovery:* 91% → ~67% after all three evictions

*Impact:*
• Product browsing will be temporarily unavailable
• Payments will continue to work normally
• Evicted pods will reschedule once disk pressure clears

✅ *Protected (NOT in eviction list):*
• `checkoutservice` — payments continue
• `paymentservice` — payment processing unaffected
• `cartservice` — cart data preserved

⚠️ *This will make product browsing unavailable. Payments will continue normally.*

Shall I proceed? @dipin
